vibe: Atmospheric, dark wood, amber liquid, dim lighting, tactile surfaces, premium yet functional.

surfaces.chat_bubble_sheldon: bg-background-surface border border-white/5 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 shadow-sm
surfaces.chat_bubble_user: bg-primary-accent/10 border border-primary-accent/20 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 text-white
surfaces.tool_card: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

components.buttons: bg-primary-accent text-[#0A0A0C] hover:bg-primary-accent-hover font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors
components.inputs: bg-[#121216] border border-white/10 focus:border-primary-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary-accent text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-3
components.badges: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-xs tracking-wider uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded

speakeasy_bg.description: Abstract dark moody speakeasy background texture, deep warm charcoal, subtle amber light bleed
speakeasy_bg.usage: Main application background or hero section overlay

sheldon_avatar.description: AI avatar of a witty young Australian bartender named Sheldon
sheldon_avatar.usage: Chat interface avatar for the AI

bar_tools_ambient.description: Close up of whiskey glass and bar tools, dark dramatic lighting
bar_tools_ambient.usage: Dashboard empty state or tool section headers

cocktail_1.description: Old fashioned style cocktail on bar counter

cocktail_2.description: Moody clear drink on wooden table

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion for smooth transitions and chat bubble pop-ins.
Implement a bottom navigation bar for mobile views, and a side panel or expanded top nav for desktop.
Use glassmorphism with dark translucent backgrounds for the chat and tool panels over the speakeasy background.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
For the tools section (ABV, batching, clashes), use Shadcn UI components but heavily customized to match the dark luxury theme (no pure white, use text-primary and background-surface).
Headings must use Cormorant Garamond, body text must use Manrope.
The primary action buttons should be the warm Amber accent (#E09132) to evoke whiskey/warm lighting.
Do not use generic blue/purple AI gradients. Stick to the dark charcoal and amber palette.
